name: Peanut-Butter-Banana Brownie Pizza
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare brownie mix according to the package instructions.
2. Spread butter evenly in a greased 12-inch pizza pan. Bake for 20 minutes. Cool completely on a wire rack.
3. In a bowl, mix cream cheese, sugar, and peanut butter with an electric mixer on medium speed until well blended.
4. Spread the mixture over the brownie base.
5. Arrange banana slices over the cream cheese mixture and sprinkle with chopped peanuts.
6. Melt chocolate and butter in a heavy saucepan over very low heat, stirring constantly until just melted. Drizzle over the bananas and peanuts.
7. Bake for 20 minutes. Makes 12 servings. Prep time: 15 minutes.
